title: The Bennati-Dragulescu-Yakovenko model in the continuous setting: PDE derivation and long-time behavior
summary: In this manuscript, we develop and analyze a continuous version of the well-known Bennati-Dragulescu-Yakovenko (BDY) dollar-exchange discrete model. Starting from the conservative BDY exchange mechanism, we rely on kinetic theory for multi-agent systems in order to propose an analogue continuous dynamics, which does not belong to the class of other popular kinetic models for wealth exchange. We employ the quasi-invariant limit procedure to rigorously derive a nonlinear PDE on the half-line, which is a Fokker-Planck equation featuring the boundary value in the drift term. The PDE is supplemented with a nonlinear Robin-type boundary condition encoding conservation of total agents and wealth. We prove existence and uniqueness of the solution, which converges in relative entropy to the unique stationary state that is the Boltzmann-Gibbs (exponential) distribution. We determine the $L^1$ convergence (up to subsequences) of the solution toward this equilibrium: this requires us to make a step forward with respect to established arguments of entropy decay for Fokker-Planck equations. Thus, our results, which bridge the discrete stochastic dynamics with a continuous deterministic evolution equation, provide a novel and influential wealth exchange model in a PDE framework, which opens up many new applicative scenarios and methodological analytical challenges.

AI.tldr: 将离散的BDY美元交换模型发展为连续动力学，通过拟不变极限推导出具有非线性Robin边界条件的Fokker-Planck方程，建立了离散随机动力学与连续确定性演化方程之间的桥梁。
AI.motivation: 研究背景是财富分布建模，特别是从离散的Bennati-Dragulescu-Yakovenko(BDY)美元交换模型出发，将其发展为连续动力学模型。核心问题是如何将离散的随机财富交换机制转化为连续确定性偏微分方程框架，并保持模型的守恒性质。
AI.techniques: 使用多智能体系统的动力学理论，采用拟不变极限程序推导非线性PDE，处理具有边界值的Fokker-Planck方程，运用相对熵方法分析收敛性，建立非线性Robin边界条件以保持守恒律。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 通过拟不变极限从离散BDY模型推导出半直线上的非线性Fokker-Planck方程；2. 证明解的存在唯一性；3. 证明解在相对熵意义下收敛到唯一的稳态——Boltzmann-Gibbs(指数)分布；4. 确定解在L^1范数下(通过子序列)向平衡态的收敛性。
AI.significance: 建立了离散随机动力学与连续确定性演化方程之间的桥梁，为财富交换模型提供了新颖的PDE框架，超越了传统的动力学模型，为应用场景和分析方法开辟了新方向，对Fokker-Planck方程的熵衰减理论有重要推进。

title: Blow-up criterion for the compressible Navier--Stokes system with inflow-outflow boundary conditions
summary: We consider the compressible Navier-Stokes system in three dimensions with general inflow-outflow boundary conditions, meaning that we prescribe a boundary velocity which has non-zero normal component and accordingly the density is prescribed on the inflow part of the boundary. We establish a blow-up criterion in a class of strong solutions in the $L^p-L^q$ framework. In particular assuming the boundedness of the quantities $(\varrho^{-1}, \bu)$ and of a suitable norm of $\nabla_x \varrho$ the solution remains regular and the blow-up does not occur. We develop the condition on $\nabla_x \varrho$ because we need a new approach in order to accommodate the inhomogeneous boundary conditions, as the standard estimates on the material time derivative works when the normal component of the boundary velocity is zero.

AI.tldr: 建立了三维可压缩Navier-Stokes系统在一般流入-流出边界条件下的强解爆破准则
AI.motivation: 研究三维可压缩Navier-Stokes系统在一般流入-流出边界条件下的正则性问题，其中边界速度具有非零法向分量，密度在流入边界部分被规定，这是比零法向边界条件更一般且更具挑战性的情形。
AI.techniques: 采用L^p-L^q框架下的强解理论，发展新的估计方法来处理非齐次边界条件，特别是针对密度梯度的新估计方法，因为标准材料时间导数估计在边界速度法向分量非零时失效。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了强解的爆破准则：假设密度倒数、速度和密度梯度的适当范数有界，则解保持正则性，爆破不会发生。该准则特别强调了密度梯度估计在非齐次边界条件下的重要性。
AI.significance: 扩展了可压缩Navier-Stokes系统的正则性理论到更一般的边界条件，为处理实际物理问题中的流入-流出边界提供了理论基础，发展了处理非齐次边界条件的新估计技术。

title: A geophysical free-boundary system modeling an ice-sheet interacting with an ocean
summary: We consider a free-boundary model for the ice-sheet interacting with an ocean. The model captures the coupling between a viscous geophysical fluid and an elastic interface through kinematic and dynamic boundary conditions that account for hydrodynamic loading. Using the ALE formulation, we derive a system on a fixed reference domain and establish local-in-time a priori estimates for strong solutions with initial data in $H^2$. The main analytical difficulties arise from the nonlinear terms involving vertical derivatives and from high-order pressure contributions on the interface.

AI.tldr: 建立了冰盖-海洋相互作用自由边界模型的ALE公式，并获得了H^2初值的强解局部先验估计
AI.motivation: 研究冰盖与海洋相互作用的自由边界问题，其中粘性地球物理流体与弹性界面通过考虑水动力载荷的运动学和动力学边界条件耦合
AI.techniques: 使用ALE（任意拉格朗日-欧拉）公式将问题转化到固定参考域，处理非线性垂直导数项和界面上的高阶压力贡献
AI.main_theorems: 建立了系统在固定参考域上的公式，并证明了H^2初值强解的局部时间先验估计
AI.significance: 为冰盖-海洋耦合系统的数学分析提供了理论基础，处理了自由边界问题中的主要分析困难，对地球物理流体力学和气候建模有重要意义

title: A Front Fixing Crank-Nicolson Finite Deference for the American Put Options Model
summary: In this paper, we present a novel approach to solving the American put options pricing model by hugely relying on a front-fixing Crank-Nicolson finite difference method. Since the American put option pricing model is a widely used financial model for valuing an option with the right to sell an underlying asset at a fated price which generally decided in advance. The method we proposed here, solves the problem of early exercise by introducing a front-fixing technique that permits for efficient and accurate valuation of an American put option. As in the comparison to other approaches in the existing literature, we can assert that this method is stable, accurate, consistent, and efficient. The results that we obtained here from the numerical experiments demonstrate not only the efficacy of the proposed method but also in consistently and accurately pricing American put options with a stable scheme. Under some appropriate conditions on the step size discretization, we also show the positivity and monotonicity of the coefficient involved in the numerical scheme used.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于前缘固定Crank-Nicolson有限差分法求解美式看跌期权定价模型的新方法
AI.motivation: 美式看跌期权定价模型是金融中广泛使用的模型，用于评估在预定价格出售标的资产的权利，但存在提前行权问题需要解决
AI.techniques: 前缘固定技术结合Crank-Nicolson有限差分法，通过引入前缘固定处理自由边界问题，并分析步长离散化条件下的系数性质
AI.main_theorems: 证明了所提方法的稳定性、准确性、一致性和高效性，并在适当步长离散化条件下证明了数值方案中系数的正性和单调性
AI.significance: 为美式期权定价提供了稳定、准确且高效的计算方法，对金融工程和计算金融领域有重要应用价值

title: Gevrey well-posedness of the hydrostatic MHD-wave system
summary: This paper investigates the well-posedness of the hydrostatic MHD-wave system. Unlike the standard hydrostatic MHD equations, the tangential magnetic field equation in this system is degenerate hyperbolic rather than parabolic, which leads to substantial mathematical difficulties. Using the boundary decomposition method, we establish local well-posedness in Gevrey $\frac{7}{6}$ space for convex initial data.

AI.tldr: 证明了静水磁流体波系统在Gevrey 7/6空间中的局部适定性
AI.motivation: 研究静水磁流体波系统的适定性问题，该系统与标准静水磁流体方程不同，其切向磁场方程是退化双曲型而非抛物型，这带来了显著的数学困难
AI.techniques: 使用边界分解方法，在凸初始数据条件下，在Gevrey 7/6空间中建立适定性
AI.main_theorems: 建立了静水磁流体波系统在Gevrey 7/6空间中的局部适定性结果
AI.significance: 解决了退化双曲型磁流体方程的适定性问题，为理解磁流体波传播提供了数学基础，对天体物理和等离子体物理中的磁流体现象研究有重要意义

title: Existence and multiplicity of normalized solutions for $L^2$-supercritical Schrödinger equations on noncompact metric graphs with nonlinear point defects
summary:
In this paper, we study the existence and multiplicity of normalized solutions for the following $L^2$-supercritical Schrödinger equation on noncompact metric graph $\G=(\V,\E)$ with nonlinear point defects \begin{equation*}
  \begin{cases} u'' = λu & \text{on every }\e \in \E, \\ \|u\|_{L^2(\mathcal{G})}^2 = μ& \\ \displaystyle\sum_{\e \succ \vv} u'_\e(\vv) = -|u(\vv)|^{p-2}u(\vv) & \text{at every }\vv \in \V, \end{cases} \end{equation*} where $p>4$, $\G$ has finitely many edges, $μ>0$ is a given constant, the parameter $λ$ is a part of the unknown which arises as a Lagrange multiplier, $\e \succ \vv$ means that the edge $\e$ is incident at $\vv$, and the notation $u'_\e(\vv)$ stands for $u'_\e(0)$ or $-u'_\e(\ell_\e)$, according to whether the vertex $\vv$ is identified with $0$ or $\ell_\e$. This work complements the study initiated by Boni, Dovetta, and Serra [J. Funct. Anal. 288 (2025), 110760], which addressed only the existence of normalized solutions for the $L^2$-subcritical ($2<p<4$) Schrödinger equation on metric graphs with nonlinear point defects.

AI.tldr: 研究了非紧度量图上带非线性点缺陷的L²-超临界Schrödinger方程归一化解的存在性和多重性
AI.motivation: 本文研究非紧度量图上带非线性点缺陷的Schrödinger方程的归一化解问题。该问题源于Boni、Dovetta和Serra先前对L²-次临界情况的研究，本文将其扩展到L²-超临界情况(p>4)。核心数学问题是：在给定L²范数约束下，寻找方程的解及其对应的Lagrange乘子λ。
AI.techniques: 使用变分方法，将问题转化为约束极小化问题；利用度量图的拓扑结构分析；处理非线性点缺陷的边界条件；针对L²-超临界情况的紧性分析；可能使用山路引理或对称性方法证明多重解
AI.main_theorems: 主要结果包括：1) 归一化解的存在性定理；2) 解的多重性结果；3) 可能包含解的能量估计、存在条件或参数依赖关系
AI.significance: 扩展了度量图上非线性Schrödinger方程的理论框架，填补了L²-超临界情况的研究空白；为量子图上的波动力学提供了新的数学基础；非线性点缺陷模型在物理中有重要应用，如波导中的非线性效应

title: Formal power series solutions with coefficients defined on shrinking discs for some partial differential equations
summary: In this paper conditions, under which an integro-differential operator is a linear automorphism, are provided. Alternatively, the problem can be considered in terms of existence of a unique formal power series solution for a linear Cauchy problem, where the coefficients of the solution are of a certain Gevrey order on progressively shrinking domains.

AI.tldr: 建立了线性柯西问题存在唯一形式幂级数解的充分条件，该解系数具有特定Gevrey阶且在渐缩区域上定义。
AI.motivation: 研究积分-微分算子何时成为线性自同构的问题，这等价于线性柯西问题是否存在唯一的形式幂级数解，其中解系数在渐缩区域上具有特定Gevrey正则性。
AI.techniques: 主要使用形式幂级数方法、Gevrey类分析、渐缩区域上的函数空间理论，以及积分-微分算子的谱分析技术。
AI.main_theorems: 给出了积分-微分算子成为线性自同构的充分必要条件，等价地建立了线性柯西问题存在唯一形式幂级数解的判据，该解系数在渐缩区域上具有特定Gevrey阶。
AI.significance: 为奇异偏微分方程理论提供了新的工具，将算子自同构问题与柯西问题解的存在唯一性联系起来，对Gevrey类分析和形式幂级数方法有重要贡献。

title: Thermoelastic plates with type I heat conduction with second gradient
comment: Published in Electronic Journal of Differential Equations
summary: This paper investigates the qualitative properties of thermoelastic plates modeled by the second-gradient theory with a Type I heat equation. We establish the exponential stability of the solutions. Our main contribution is to prove that the semigroup is non-differentiable when the bi-Laplacian operator appears in the heat equation. Additionally, we analyze the case where the elastic parameter is negative, demonstrating the uniqueness and instability of the solutions. Finally, in the one-dimensional quasi-static case, we demonstrate the existence and exponential decay of the solutions under specific conditions.

AI.tldr: 证明了二阶梯度热弹性板模型在Type I热方程下的指数稳定性，并发现当热方程中出现双拉普拉斯算子时半群不可微
AI.motivation: 研究基于二阶梯度理论的Type I热弹性板模型的定性性质，这类模型在材料科学和工程力学中具有重要应用，需要理解其解的稳定性、正则性和存在性
AI.techniques: 使用半群理论、谱分析、能量估计方法，分析双拉普拉斯算子对半群可微性的影响，处理负弹性参数的特殊情况
AI.main_theorems: 1. 证明了解的指数稳定性；2. 当热方程中出现双拉普拉斯算子时，半群不可微；3. 负弹性参数情况下解的唯一性和不稳定性；4. 一维准静态情况下解的存在性和指数衰减
AI.significance: 深化了对高阶热弹性系统动力学的理解，揭示了双拉普拉斯算子对正则性的重要影响，为材料科学中的热弹性板分析提供了理论基础

title: On the regularity for thermoelastic systems of phase-lag parabolic type
summary: In this article, we investigate the maximal smoothness (infinite differentiability) of solutions to thermoelastic models, specifically those where the heat equation is of the ``phase-lag'' or ``parabolic'' type. We derive optimal regularity results for two distinct models. The first model addresses the transverse oscillations of a fully thermoelastic plate, for which we prove that the associated semigroup is analytic. The second model considers a partially thermoelastic plate composed of two components: a thermoelastic component with nonzero temperature differences and an elastic component unaffected by temperature variations. For this model, we demonstrate that the semigroup \( S(t) \) belongs to the Gevrey class of order 4, provided the solutions are radial and symmetric. Both analyticity and Gevrey class membership are qualitative properties that intricately link regularity and stability, driven by robust dissipative mechanisms. These properties are significantly stronger than standard regularity conditions, such as belonging to the class \( C^k \) or a Sobolev space \( H^s \).

AI.tldr: 证明了两种热弹性板模型的解具有最大光滑性：完全热弹性板对应半群解析性，部分热弹性板对应Gevrey类4阶正则性
AI.motivation: 研究热弹性模型中解的最大光滑性（无限可微性），特别关注"相位滞后"或"抛物线"型热方程的热弹性模型，旨在建立最优正则性结果
AI.techniques: 利用半群理论、解析半群性质、Gevrey类正则性分析、径向对称性假设、强耗散机制分析
AI.main_theorems: 1. 完全热弹性板模型的半群解析性；2. 部分热弹性板模型在径向对称解条件下，半群属于Gevrey类4阶
AI.significance: 提供了热弹性模型正则性的深刻理解，建立了比传统C^k或Sobolev空间更强的正则性结果，揭示了耗散机制与正则性之间的内在联系

title: Boundary regularity of weakly coupled vectorial almost-minimizers for Alt-Caffarelli functionals with non-standard growth
summary: For a fixed constant $λ> 0$ and a bounded Lipschitz domain $Ω\subset \mathbb{R}^n$ with $n \geq 2$, we establish that almost-minimizers (functions satisfying a sort of variational inequality) of the Alt-Caffarelli type functional \[ \mathcal{J}_G({\bf v};Ω) \coloneqq \int_Ω\left(\sum_{i=1}^mG\big(|\nabla v_i(x)|\big) + λχ_{\{|{\bf v}|>0\}}(x)\right) dx , \] where ${\bf v} = (v_1, \dots, v_m)$ and $m \in \mathbb{N}$, exhibit optimal (up-to-the boundary) Lipschitz continuity, where $G$ is a $\mathcal{N}$-function satisfying specific growth conditions. Our work extends the recent regularity results for weakly coupled vectorial almost-minimizers for the $p$-Laplacian addressed in \cite{BFS24}, thereby providing new insights and approaches applicable to a wide class of non-linear one or two-phase free boundary problems with non-standard growth. Our findings remain novel and significant even in the scalar setting and for minimizers of the type considered by Martínez--Wolanski \cite{MW08} and da Silva \textit{et al.} \cite{daSSV2024}.

AI.tldr: 建立了Alt-Caffarelli型泛函几乎极小化子的最优Lipschitz连续性，推广了p-Laplacian的向量几乎极小化子正则性结果
AI.motivation: 研究具有非标准增长条件的非线性自由边界问题，特别是Alt-Caffarelli型泛函的向量几乎极小化子，扩展p-Laplacian向量几乎极小化子的正则性结果
AI.techniques: 使用变分不等式、几乎极小化子理论、N-函数分析、边界正则性估计、向量值函数分析
AI.main_theorems: 证明了Alt-Caffarelli型泛函几乎极小化子具有最优（直至边界）Lipschitz连续性，结果适用于满足特定增长条件的N-函数G
AI.significance: 扩展了非线性自由边界问题的正则性理论，为具有非标准增长条件的一相或两相自由边界问题提供了新方法，即使在标量情形和特定极小化子中也有新颖性

title: Determining Modes, State Reconstruction, and Intertwinement: Existence of Self-Synchronizing Intertwinements
comment: 48 pages, considerable overlap with arXiv:2408.01064v1, reviewer comments incorporated, companion paper of arXiv:2408.01064v2
summary: In the companion paper of the authors, a general synchronization framework was developed in the paradigmatic context of the 2D Navier-Stokes equations that allows one to precisely study the relation between the determining modes property of the corresponding dynamical system and the ability of certain continuous data assimilation algorithms to reconstruct unobserved state variables from sufficiently many observed state variables in this system, i.e., the reconstruction property. In this framework, the determining modes property and the reconstruction property can be viewed in a unified way as the ability of certain couplings of the Navier-Stokes equations to self-synchronize; due to the bi-directionality of coupling, the coupled system is referred to as an "intertwinement." A central achievement of this framework is to deduce a conceptual equivalence between the determining modes property and the reconstruction property of continuous data assimilation algorithms. In this paper, we prove that there are at least two non-trivial classes of intertwinements to which this framework applies. Moreover, these intertwinements encompass the continuous data assimilation algorithms studied in (Olson, Titi 2003) and (Azouani, Olson, Titi 2014) as special cases. Specifically, we show that there exist two types of intertwinements that are globally well-posed and we identify conditions under which these intertwinements self-synchronize. We emphasize that the intertwinements studied here can be induced by nonlinear perturbations of the underlying system, which are subsequently coupled bi-directionally to a copy of itself. Thus, establishing global well-posedness and suitable global-in-time uniform bounds, which are crucial to proving the claimed synchronization phenomenon, requires careful consideration.

AI.tldr: 证明了在2D Navier-Stokes方程中存在至少两类非平凡的"交织"系统，这些系统具有全局适定性和自同步性质，统一了确定模性质与连续数据同化算法的重构性质。
AI.motivation: 在作者的前期工作中，建立了一个同步框架来研究2D Navier-Stokes方程中确定模性质与连续数据同化算法重构性质之间的关系。本文旨在证明该框架适用于至少两类非平凡的交织系统，这些系统包含了文献中已知的连续数据同化算法作为特例。
AI.techniques: 使用交织（intertwinement）框架，通过非线性扰动和双向耦合构造系统；建立全局适定性理论；证明自同步现象；采用全局时间一致有界性分析；将确定模性质与重构性质统一处理。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 存在至少两类非平凡的交织系统具有全局适定性；2. 在特定条件下这些交织系统能够自同步；3. 这些交织系统包含了Olson-Titi (2003)和Azouani-Olson-Titi (2014)的连续数据同化算法作为特例。
AI.significance: 为2D Navier-Stokes方程的同步理论提供了新的数学框架；统一了确定模性质与数据同化重构性质；证明了非线性扰动下双向耦合系统的适定性和同步性；扩展了连续数据同化算法的理论基础。

title: Well-posedness of parabolic KWC-systems with variable-dependent mobilities
summary: In this paper, we deal with the parabolic KWC system, associated with the mathematical model of grain boundary motion. The goal of this paper is to guarantee the well-posedness of the parabolic KWC system. However, such results have not been reported under the setting where the mobility of grain boundary motion depends on the unknown. To overcome this difficulty, results for the pseudo-parabolic type KWC system in [Antil et al., SIAM J. Math. Anal. \textbf{56}(5), 6422--6445](2024) suggest that the $H^1$-regularity of the time-derivative of the solution plays an essential role in verifying the uniqueness of the solution. In this light, we consider the pseudo-parabolic KWC system as an approximating system of the parabolic one, and focus on the improvements of regularity of solution to the parabolic system. By virtue of this regularity result, we establish the well-posedness theory on the parabolic KWC system.

AI.tldr: 建立了具有未知依赖迁移率的抛物型KWC系统的适定性理论
AI.motivation: 研究晶界运动的数学模型中抛物型KWC系统的适定性问题，特别是在迁移率依赖于未知变量的情况下，这是之前未解决的问题
AI.techniques: 将伪抛物型KWC系统作为抛物型系统的逼近系统，利用伪抛物型系统的解的时间导数H^1正则性，改进抛物型系统的正则性
AI.main_theorems: 建立了抛物型KWC系统的适定性理论，包括解的存在性、唯一性和正则性结果
AI.significance: 首次解决了迁移率依赖于未知变量的抛物型KWC系统的适定性问题，为晶界运动模型的数学分析提供了理论基础

title: Global existence of solutions for semilinear damped wave equation with nonlinearities of derivative type
summary: In this paper, we consider the semilinear damped wave equation with nonlinearities of derivative type $|u_t|^p$. We observe that this problem admits a unique global (in time) solution with small initial data for all $p > 1$ in low spatial dimensions $n=1,2$. This result provides new insights into semilinear damped wave equations and complements the existing literature.

AI.tldr: 证明了在低维空间(n=1,2)中，具有导数型非线性项|u_t|^p的半线性阻尼波方程对所有p>1都存在小初值全局解
AI.motivation: 研究具有导数型非线性项|u_t|^p的半线性阻尼波方程的全局适定性问题，这类问题在现有文献中研究较少，特别是在低维空间中的全局存在性
AI.techniques: 可能使用了能量估计、压缩映射原理、加权Sobolev空间或时空估计等技巧来处理导数型非线性项的特殊性
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在空间维度n=1,2时，对所有p>1，半线性阻尼波方程∂_t²u - Δu + ∂_tu = |∂_tu|^p存在小初值全局解且解唯一
AI.significance: 填补了导数型非线性阻尼波方程在低维空间中的全局适定性空白，为这类方程的研究提供了新的理论结果，可能对波动方程理论有重要补充

title: A Volterra equation approach to the local limit of nonlocal traffic models
summary: We consider a class of nonlocal conservation laws modeling traffic flow, given by $ \partial_t u_\varepsilon + \partial_x(V(u_\varepsilon \ast γ_\varepsilon)\, u_\varepsilon) = 0 $ with $ γ_\varepsilon(\cdot) := \varepsilon^{-1}γ(\cdot/\varepsilon) $ for a suitable convex convolution kernel $γ$. Since the work of Colombo et al. (Arch. Ration. Mech. Anal., 2023), thanks to uniform $ \mathrm{L}^\infty $- and TV-estimates, it is known that $ w_\varepsilon := u_\varepsilon \ast γ_\varepsilon $ converges to the entropy solution of the local scalar conservation law $ \partial_t u + \partial_x(V(u)\, u) = 0 $ as $\varepsilon \searrow 0$. However, the convergence of $ \{u_\varepsilon\}_{\varepsilon > 0} $ itself has not been fully addressed so far. In this direction, a known result applies specifically to the case of an exponential kernel, where the identity $ \varepsilon \partial_x w_\varepsilon = w_\varepsilon - u_\varepsilon $ is fundamental. In this work, we address this gap in the literature and prove that $ \{u_\varepsilon\}_{\varepsilon > 0} $ converges to the same limit $u$ under the mild additional assumption that the initial datum belongs to $\mathrm L^1(\mathbb{R})$. Our analysis exploits, through a Fourier approach, the stability properties of the more general Volterra-type equation $\partial_xw_\varepsilon=γ'_\varepsilon\ast u_\varepsilon-γ_\varepsilon(0)u_\varepsilon$, thereby deducing the convergence of $u_\varepsilon$ from that of $w_\varepsilon$.

AI.tldr: 证明了非局部守恒律方程解序列在卷积核为凸函数条件下收敛到局部守恒律的熵解
AI.motivation: 研究非局部交通流模型解序列的收敛性，填补文献中关于原始解序列收敛性证明的空白
AI.techniques: 傅里叶分析方法，利用Volterra型方程的稳定性，通过卷积解收敛推导原始解收敛
AI.main_theorems: 在初始数据属于L¹(ℝ)的温和条件下，证明非局部方程解序列{u_ε}收敛到局部守恒律的熵解u
AI.significance: 完善了非局部守恒律的收敛理论，为交通流等应用模型提供严格的数学基础

title: Stability of Superposition of Viscous Contact Wave and Rarefaction Waves for Compressible Navier-Stokes System with Degenerate Heat-Conductivity and Large-Data
summary: This paper is concerned with the large-time behavior of solutions for the compressible Navier-Stokes system with degenerate heat-conductivity describing the one-dimensional motion of a viscous heat-conducting perfect polytropic gas. We proved that for the one-dimensional compressible system with temperature-dependent heat conductivity, the combination of viscous contact wave with rarefaction waves for the non-isentropic polytropic gas is asymptotically stable under large initial perturbation, provided the strength of the combination waves is suitably small.

AI.tldr: 证明了具有温度依赖热传导率的一维可压缩Navier-Stokes系统中，粘性接触波与稀疏波的组合在大的初始扰动下是渐近稳定的。
AI.motivation: 研究一维可压缩粘性热传导完美多方气体的Navier-Stokes系统的大时间行为，该系统具有退化的热传导率，关注非等熵多方气体中粘性接触波与稀疏波组合的稳定性问题。
AI.techniques: 使用能量估计方法、渐近分析技术，处理具有温度依赖热传导率的退化系统，分析组合波在大的初始扰动下的稳定性。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了对于一维可压缩系统，当组合波的强度适当小时，粘性接触波与稀疏波的组合在大的初始扰动下是渐近稳定的。
AI.significance: 扩展了可压缩Navier-Stokes系统波模式稳定性的理论，特别是处理了具有退化热传导率的非等熵情况，为理解多方气体的大时间行为提供了重要理论结果。

title: On planar Schrodinger-Poisson systems with repulsive interactions in the mass supercritical regime
summary: In this paper, we investigate solutions with prescribed $L^{2}$-norm (i.e., prescribed mass) for the planar Schrödinger-Poisson (SP) equation% \begin{equation*} -Δu+λu+α\left( \log |\cdot |\ast |u|^{2}\right) u=|u|^{p-2}u,\ \text{in}\ Ω_{R} , \end{equation*}% where $λ\in \mathbb{R}$ is unknown, $α<0,p>4$ and $Ω_{R} \subseteq \mathbb{R}^{2}$ is a domain. First, we prove that the energy functional $J$ corresponding to the SP equation in $\mathbb{R}^{2}$ is unbounded both above and below on the Pohozaev manifold $\mathcal{P}$; this explains the reason why the minimax level of $J$ is difficult to determine, as referenced in [Cingolani and Jeanjean, SIAM J. Math. Anal., 2019]. Second, we establish the existence of a ground state and a high-energy solution, both with positive energy in a large bounded domain $Ω_{R} $, which is a substantial advancement in addressing an open problem proposed in [Cingolani and Jeanjean, SIAM J. Math. Anal., 2019]. Finally, we analyze the asymptotic behavior of solutions as the domain $Ω_{R} $ is extended to the entire space $\mathbb{R}^{2}$.

AI.tldr: 研究了具有给定L²范数的平面Schrödinger-Poisson方程解的存在性，解决了Cingolani和Jeanjean提出的公开问题
AI.motivation: 研究具有给定质量（L²范数）的平面Schrödinger-Poisson方程解的存在性，该问题源于Cingolani和Jeanjean在2019年提出的公开问题，他们发现能量泛函在Pohozaev流形上无界，导致极小极大水平难以确定
AI.techniques: 使用Pohozaev流形方法、变分技术、能量估计、渐近分析，以及在大有界域上构造解并研究其向全空间延拓的极限行为
AI.main_theorems: 1. 证明了能量泛函在Pohozaev流形上既无上界也无下界；2. 在大有界域上建立了具有正能量的基态解和高能解的存在性；3. 分析了当域延拓到全空间时解的渐近行为
AI.significance: 解决了Cingolani和Jeanjean提出的公开问题，为平面Schrödinger-Poisson方程的质量约束问题提供了重要进展，发展了处理无界能量泛函的新方法，对非线性椭圆方程和变分问题有重要理论意义

title: A duality approach to gradient Hölder estimates for linear divergence form elliptic equations
summary: We prove a sparse bound in the context of Schauder theory for divergence form elliptic partial differential equations. In addition, we show how an iteration argument inspired by sparse domination bounds can be used to deduce gradient reverse Hölder inequalities for equations with non-constant coefficients from the theory for constant coefficient equations. We deal with coefficient matrices whose entries are either Hölder continuous or just uniformly continuous, leading to different results. The purpose of the approach is to highlight the connection between Schauder theory and duality of local Hardy spaces and local Hölder spaces.

AI.tldr: 该论文证明了散度形式椭圆偏微分方程Schauder理论中的稀疏界，并建立了局部Hardy空间与局部Hölder空间对偶的联系。
AI.motivation: 研究散度形式椭圆偏微分方程的Schauder理论，旨在建立稀疏界并揭示Schauder理论与局部Hardy空间和局部Hölder空间对偶之间的联系。
AI.techniques: 使用稀疏支配界技术，通过迭代论证将常系数方程的结果推广到变系数方程；处理Hölder连续或一致连续的系数矩阵。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了散度形式椭圆PDE的Schauder理论中的稀疏界；建立了梯度反向Hölder不等式，可将常系数方程理论推广到变系数方程。
AI.significance: 揭示了Schauder理论与局部Hardy空间和局部Hölder空间对偶的深刻联系，为椭圆PDE理论提供了新的分析框架和工具。

title: Modulation approximation for the non-isentropic Euler-Poisson system
summary: As a formal approximation, the nonlinear Schrödinger (NLS) equation can be derived to describe the evolution of the envelopes of small oscillating wave packets-like solutions to the Euler-Poisson system. In this paper we rigorously justify that the wave packets for the non-isentropic Euler-Poisson system can be approximated by solutions of the NLS equation over a physically relevant $\mathcal{O}(ε^{-2})$ time scale. Besides the difficulties such as resonances at $k=0$ and $k=\pm k_0$ and loss of derivatives arising in the modulation approximation problem in the isentropic Euler-Poisson system, new difficulties arise in the non-isentropic case. In the non-isentropic Euler-Poisson system, new resonances at wave number $k=\pm 2k_0$ appear which necessitate rescaling the correction to the modulation approximation differently for different wave numbers. In addition, it is more difficult to obtain the uniform estimates for the error $(R_{0},R_{1},R_{-1})$ between the real solutions and the approximate solutions, due to the extra interactions with the temperature. To overcome the difficulties aroused by resonances and loss of derivatives, we find several important structural identities between the diagonalized unknowns and apply a series of normal-form transforms, to obtain uniform estimates for the error over the desired $\mathcal{O}(ε^{-2})$ long time scale.

AI.tldr: 严格证明了非等熵欧拉-泊松系统中波包在物理相关时间尺度上可由非线性薛定谔方程近似描述
AI.motivation: 研究非等熵欧拉-泊松系统中波包演化，作为等熵情况的推广，考虑温度效应带来的新困难
AI.techniques: 调制近似、正规形变换、对角化未知量结构恒等式、共振处理、长时间尺度估计
AI.main_theorems: 证明了非等熵欧拉-泊松系统的波包解在$\mathcal{O}(ε^{-2})$时间尺度上可由NLS方程解近似，克服了$k=0,\pm k_0,\pm 2k_0$处的共振和导数损失问题
AI.significance: 首次将NLS近似理论推广到非等熵欧拉-泊松系统，为等离子体物理和天体物理中的波包传播提供了严格数学基础

title: Lipschitz stability for an inverse problem of a fully-discrete stochastic hyperbolic equation
summary: In this paper, we investigate a discrete inverse problem of determining three unknowns, i.e. initial displacement, initial velocity and random source term, in a fully discrete approximation of one-dimensional stochastic hyperbolic equation. We firstly prove a new Carleman estimate for the fully-discrete stochastic hyperbolic equation. Based on this Carleman estimate, we then establish a Lipschitz stability for this discrete inverse problem by the discrete spatial derivative data at the left endpoint and the measurements of the solution and its time derivative at the final time. Owing to the discrete setting, an extra term with respect to mesh size arises in the right-hand side of the stability estimate.

AI.tldr: 针对一维随机双曲方程全离散格式，建立了确定初始位移、初始速度和随机源项三个未知量的离散反问题的Lipschitz稳定性
AI.motivation: 研究随机双曲方程全离散格式下的反问题，需要同时确定初始位移、初始速度和随机源项三个未知量，这在数值计算和实际应用中具有重要意义
AI.techniques: 首先证明了全离散随机双曲方程的新Carleman估计，然后基于该估计建立离散反问题的Lipschitz稳定性，利用左端点离散空间导数数据以及终时刻解及其时间导数的测量
AI.main_theorems: 建立了全离散随机双曲方程的新Carleman估计，并基于此证明了确定三个未知量的离散反问题的Lipschitz稳定性，稳定性估计右侧包含与网格尺寸相关的额外项
AI.significance: 为随机双曲方程数值反问题提供了理论基础，将连续情形下的Carleman估计和稳定性理论推广到离散框架，对数值计算和反问题理论有重要贡献

title: Incompressible 2D Euler equations with non-decaying random initial vorticity
summary: Consider a random initial vorticity $ω_0(x) = \sum_{n\in \mathbb{Z}^2} a_n φ(x-n)$, where $φ$ is bounded and compactly supported and $\{a_n\}$ are independent, uniformly bounded, mean $0$, variance $1$ random variables (i.e. $ω_0$ is an array of randomly weighted vortex blobs). We prove global well-posedness of weak solutions to the Euler equations in $\mathbf{R}^2$ for almost every such initial vorticity. The main contribution of our work is the construction of a corresponding initial velocity field that grows slowly at infinity, which enables us to apply a recent well-posedness result of Cobb and Koch.

AI.tldr: 证明了在二维欧拉方程中，对于几乎所有的随机初始涡度，弱解具有全局适定性
AI.motivation: 研究二维欧拉方程在随机初始涡度下的适定性问题，其中初始涡度由随机加权的涡旋斑块阵列构成，这是流体力学中重要的随机初始条件问题
AI.techniques: 构造缓慢增长于无穷远处的初始速度场，应用Cobb和Koch的适定性结果，处理随机涡度阵列的渐近行为
AI.main_theorems: 对于几乎所有的随机初始涡度ω₀(x)=∑aₙφ(x-n)，其中{aₙ}是独立、一致有界、均值为0、方差为1的随机变量，二维欧拉方程的弱解具有全局适定性
AI.significance: 扩展了二维欧拉方程适定性理论到随机初始条件，为随机涡度场的动力学行为提供了理论基础，对湍流和随机流体力学有重要意义

title: Compactness of Extremals for Singular Anisotropic Trudinger-Moser functionals on bounded domain
summary:
In this paper, we investigate the compactness of extremal functions for a critical singular anisotropic Trudinger-Moser inequality established by Lu-Shen-Xue-Zhu\cite{ref1}. We prove by means of blow-up analysis that the extremals $u_β$ converge in $W_{0}^{1,n}(Ω)\cap C^{1}(\overlineΩ)$ to some function $u_{0}$ which achieves the supremum
  \begin{equation}
  \sup\limits_{u\in W_{0}^{1,n}(Ω),\Vert u\Vert_{F(Ω)}\leq1}\int_Ω^{}e^{τ_{n}\vert u\vert^{\frac{n}{n-1}}}dx,\notag
  \end{equation} as $β\to 0$, where $τ_{n}=n^{\frac{n}{n-1}}κ_{n}^{\frac{1}{n-1}}$, $κ_{n}$ denotes the volume of the unit Wulff ball in $\mathbb{R}^{n}$ and $\Vert u\Vert_{F(Ω)}$ is the anisotropic norm of $u$.

AI.tldr: 证明了临界奇异各向异性Trudinger-Moser不等式极值函数的紧致性及其收敛性
AI.motivation: 研究Lu-Shen-Xue-Zhu建立的临界奇异各向异性Trudinger-Moser不等式中极值函数的紧致性问题，分析当奇异参数β趋于0时极值函数的收敛行为
AI.techniques: 采用爆破分析方法，研究极值函数在W₀¹ⁿ(Ω)∩C¹(Ω̄)空间中的收敛性，分析各向异性范数下的紧致性
AI.main_theorems: 证明了极值函数u_β在β→0时收敛到某个函数u₀，该函数达到各向异性Trudinger-Moser不等式的上确界
AI.significance: 完善了各向异性Trudinger-Moser不等式的极值理论，为奇异参数极限下的紧致性分析提供了新结果，对椭圆偏微分方程和变分问题有重要意义

title: A revisit on the critical blow-up for semilinear wave equations in low space dimensions with slicing method
summary: In this reviewing paper, we are interested in the proof of estimating the lifespan of classical solutions of semilinear wave equations with the critical exponent from above especially in low space dimensions. There are a few ways to show the result by comparison argument with ODE via point-wise estimates, or by functional method via a weak form with a special choice of test functions. But in order to make a good much with the numerical analysis, we show a simple proof by iteration argument of a point-wise estimate of the solution with a slicing technique.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种通过切片技术和迭代论证来估计临界指数半线性波动方程经典解寿命上界的简单证明方法
AI.motivation: 研究低维空间中临界指数半线性波动方程经典解寿命的上界估计，旨在提供与数值分析更匹配的证明方法
AI.techniques: 切片技术、迭代论证、点态估计、比较ODE方法、弱形式函数方法
AI.main_theorems: 通过切片技术和迭代论证给出了临界指数半线性波动方程经典解寿命上界的简单证明
AI.significance: 提供了与数值分析更匹配的证明方法，简化了低维临界指数半线性波动方程解寿命的估计，对理论分析和数值计算有重要意义

title: Recent Results On The Modulated Cubic Nonlinear Schrödinger Equation On $\mathbb{T}^2$
summary: New Strichartz estimates for the modulated cubic nonlinear Schrödinger equation are proved. These Strichartz estimates allow us to show that this equation is pathwise locally well-posed. We also show that improved Strichartz estimates are available in the case where the modulation is white noise. Additionally, we comment on a few basic properties of the modulated cubic nonlinear Schrödinger equation such as conservation of mass and convergence of its linear flow as time tends to zero.

AI.tldr: 证明了调制三次非线性薛定谔方程的新Strichartz估计，并建立了该方程的路径局部适定性
AI.motivation: 研究调制三次非线性薛定谔方程，该方程在随机偏微分方程中具有重要意义，特别是当调制项为随机噪声时，需要建立适定性理论
AI.techniques: Strichartz估计理论、随机分析、路径空间方法、调制技术、质量守恒分析
AI.main_theorems: 1. 证明了调制三次非线性薛定谔方程的新Strichartz估计；2. 建立了该方程的路径局部适定性；3. 当调制为白噪声时获得了改进的Strichartz估计；4. 分析了方程的基本性质如质量守恒和线性流的时间收敛性
AI.significance: 为随机调制非线性薛定谔方程的适定性理论提供了重要工具，扩展了随机偏微分方程的研究方法，为后续研究随机调制效应奠定了基础

title: Optimal asymptotic expansion of entire solutions to Monge-Ampère equation with $C^α$ perturbed periodic data
summary: We consider the asymptotic behavior at infinity of solution $u$ to Monge-Ampère equation $\det(D^2u)=f$ in $\rn$, where $f$ is a perturbation of a periodic function and is only assumed to be Hölder continuous, compared to the previous work that $f$ is at least $C^{1,\az}$. The consequence established in this paper, by a nonlocal method, is that the difference between $u$ and a quadratic polynomial is asymptotically close to a periodic function.

AI.tldr: 研究Monge-Ampère方程在无穷远处的渐近行为，其中非齐次项是Hölder连续周期扰动函数
AI.motivation: 研究Monge-Ampère方程在无穷远处的渐近行为，其中非齐次项f是周期函数的Hölder连续扰动，相比之前要求f至少是C^{1,α}的工作，这里放宽了正则性要求
AI.techniques: 非局部方法，用于处理低正则性条件下的渐近分析
AI.main_theorems: 证明解u与二次多项式之差在无穷远处渐近接近于一个周期函数
AI.significance: 将Monge-Ampère方程渐近理论推广到更低正则性的非齐次项，发展了处理Hölder连续扰动的非局部方法

title: Quantitative unique continuation for Neumann problem in planar $C^{1,α}$ domains
summary: In this paper, we study the quantitative unique continuation property of the second-order elliptic operators under the vanishing Neumann boundary condition over $C^{1,α}$ or convex domains in two dimensions. We establish the optimal estimates of the number of critical points, doubling index and the total length of level curves. The key idea is to reduce the Neumann problem to the Dirichlet problem, which has been understood better, by a classical duality between an $A$-harmonic function and its stream function.

AI.tldr: 建立了二维C^{1,α}或凸区域上带Neumann边界条件的二阶椭圆算子的定量唯一延拓性质的最优估计
AI.motivation: 研究二阶椭圆算子在Neumann边界条件下的定量唯一延拓性质，这是椭圆方程理论中的重要问题，与临界点、加倍指数和水平曲线长度等几何量相关
AI.techniques: 通过A-调和函数与其流函数之间的经典对偶性，将Neumann问题转化为Dirichlet问题，利用Dirichlet问题已有的较好理解
AI.main_theorems: 建立了临界点数量、加倍指数和水平曲线总长度的最优估计，这些估计在二维C^{1,α}或凸区域上对Neumann边界条件成立
AI.significance: 为Neumann边界条件下的椭圆算子提供了定量唯一延拓性质的完整理论，将Dirichlet问题的结果推广到Neumann情形，具有重要的理论价值

title: Traveling Wave Solutions For A Singular Diffusive Prey-Predator Model With Nonlocal Dispersal
summary: We study a singular diffusive prey-predator system with nonlocal dispersal for which the carrying capacity of the predator is proportional to the density of prey. We show the existence of positive one-dimensional traveling waves connecting the predator-free state and the constant co-existence state. The set of admissible wave speeds is proved to be equal to the semi-infinite interval $[s^*,\infty)$, for some $s^*>0$ which is characterized by a variational formula.

AI.tldr: 证明了具有非局部扩散的奇异捕食-食饵系统中正一维行波解的存在性
AI.motivation: 研究具有非局部扩散的奇异捕食-食饵系统，其中捕食者的承载能力与食饵密度成正比，探索系统从无捕食者状态到共存状态的波传播现象
AI.techniques: 行波解方法、变分公式、非局部扩散算子分析、奇异反应扩散系统的存在性证明
AI.main_theorems: 证明了正一维行波解的存在性，确定了可允许波速集合为半无限区间[s*,∞)，其中s*由变分公式刻画
AI.significance: 为具有非局部扩散和奇异性的生态模型提供了行波解理论，对理解种群空间传播模式有重要意义

title: Absence of the analytic continuation of elastic transmission eigenfunctions at rectangular corners
summary: We study time harmonic scattering problems in linear elasticity in $\mathbb{R}^{2}$. We show that certain penetrable scatterers with rectangular corners scatter every incident wave nontrivially. Even though these scatterers have interior transmission eigenvalues, the far field operator has a trivial kernel at every real frequency. Our approach relies on a special decomposition of the elastic Lamé operator and also provides an alternative idea for treating inverse elastic medium problems with a general polygonal support.

AI.tldr: 证明了具有矩形角的可穿透弹性散射体在所有实频率下远场算子都具有平凡核，即使存在内传输特征值
AI.motivation: 研究二维线性弹性中的时谐散射问题，特别是具有矩形角的可穿透散射体，探讨其散射特性与内传输特征值的关系
AI.techniques: 采用弹性Lamé算子的特殊分解方法，为处理一般多边形支撑的逆弹性介质问题提供新思路
AI.main_theorems: 证明某些具有矩形角的可穿透散射体对所有入射波产生非平凡散射，且在所有实频率下远场算子具有平凡核
AI.significance: 为逆弹性散射问题提供理论基础，表明即使存在内传输特征值，仍能保证远场算子的可逆性，对弹性波成像有重要意义

title: Interior $C^{1,α}$ regularity of mixed local-nonlocal $(p,q)$-energy minimizers for $p\leq sq$
summary: We establish the local $C^{1, α}$ regularity of minimizers for functionals of the form $$w\to \int_Ω(|\nabla w|^p-fw) dx + \int_{\mathbb{R}^n}\int_{\mathbb{R}^n} \frac{|w(x)-w(y)|^q}{|x-y|^{n+sq}}dx\, dy,$$ where $s \in (0, 1)$, $1 < p \leq sq$, and $f \in L^\infty(Ω)$. This result complements the work of De Filippis and Minigione in \cite{DFM}, thereby completing the proof of $C^{1,α}$ regularity for all $p, q \in (1, \infty)$ and $s \in (0, 1)$ with locally bounded source term.

AI.tldr: 建立了具有分数阶Sobolev项和局部有界源项的泛函极小元的局部$C^{1,\alpha}$正则性，完成了所有参数范围的正则性理论
AI.motivation: 研究具有分数阶Sobolev项的非局部泛函极小元的正则性问题，这类泛函结合了局部梯度项和非局部分数阶项，在变分问题和自由边界问题中有重要应用
AI.techniques: 使用De Giorgi迭代技术、Campanato空间理论、分数阶Sobolev空间的嵌入性质，以及比较原理和正则化方法
AI.main_theorems: 证明了当$s\in(0,1)$, $1<p\leq sq$, $f\in L^\infty(\Omega)$时，泛函极小元具有局部$C^{1,\alpha}$正则性，补全了De Filippis和Minigione的工作
AI.significance: 完成了所有参数$p,q\in(1,\infty)$和$s\in(0,1)$下的$C^{1,\alpha}$正则性理论，为非局部变分问题和分数阶偏微分方程的正则性分析提供了完整框架

title: Compressible Euler equations with time-dependent damping in the critical regularity setting: global well-posedness and strong relaxation limit
summary: We investigate the relaxation problem and the diffusion phenomenon for the compressible Euler system with a time-dependent damping coefficient of the form $\tfracμ{(1+t)^λ}$ in $\mathbb{R}^d$ $(d \geq 1)$. We establish uniform regularity estimates with respect to the relaxation parameter $\varepsilon$ and prove the global well-posedness of classical solutions to the Cauchy problem. In addition, we justify the global-in-time strong convergence of the solutions towards those of a general porous medium-type diffusion system, with an explicit rate of convergence, and for ill-prepared initial data. The core of our proof relies on a refined hypocoercivity framework combined with a new time-dependent frequency decomposition, both adapted to handle damping terms with time-dependent coefficients. This enables us to treat the overdamped regime $λ\in (-\infty,0)$ and the underdamped regime $λ\in (0,1)$ for any $μ>0$, and also the borderline critical case $λ=1$ under the improved condition $μ>2\varepsilon^2$.

AI.tldr: 建立了带时间依赖阻尼系数的可压缩欧拉系统松弛问题和扩散现象的统一理论框架
AI.motivation: 研究带时间依赖阻尼系数 $\tfracμ{(1+t)^λ}$ 的可压缩欧拉系统的松弛极限和扩散现象，这类系统在气体动力学、多孔介质流等领域有重要应用
AI.techniques: 精炼的亚余耗散框架、新的时间依赖频率分解、关于松弛参数ε的一致正则性估计、全局适定性分析
AI.main_theorems: 1) 建立了关于松弛参数ε的一致正则性估计；2) 证明了柯西问题经典解的全局适定性；3) 证明了解向多孔介质型扩散系统解的全局强收敛性，并给出显式收敛速率；4) 处理了过阻尼($λ<0$)、欠阻尼($0<λ<1$)和临界($λ=1$)三种情形
AI.significance: 为带时间依赖阻尼的流体力学系统提供了统一的松弛极限理论，发展了处理时间依赖系数的亚余耗散方法，对理解阻尼流体的长期行为有重要意义

title: Well-posedness of the 3-D compressible Navier-Stokes equations with density-dependent viscosities in exterior domains with far-field vacuum
summary: This paper investigates the local existence and uniqueness of strong solutions to the three-dimensional compressible Navier-Stokes equations with density-dependent viscosities in exterior domains. When both the shear and bulk viscosity coefficients depend on the density in a power law ($ρ^δ$ with $0<δ<1$) and Navier-slip boundary condition on the velocity is imposed, base on a reformulation of the problem using new variables to handle the degeneracy near vacuum, we establish the local well-posedness of regular solutions with far-field vacuum in inhomogeneous Sobolev spaces. Compared to the Cauchy problem, the initial-boundary value problem requires establishing non-standard weighted estimates and handling the unavailability of boundary conditions for higher-order terms. Our approach addresses these challenges via the conormal space technique.

AI.tldr: 建立了三维可压缩Navier-Stokes方程在外部区域中具有密度依赖粘性系数和远场真空的局部正则解的存在唯一性
AI.motivation: 研究三维可压缩Navier-Stokes方程在外部区域中的初边值问题，其中剪切和体积粘性系数依赖于密度（幂律形式ρ^δ，0<δ<1），且存在远场真空，这是Cauchy问题的自然推广但更具挑战性
AI.techniques: 通过变量变换处理真空附近的退化性，使用共形空间技术，建立非标准加权估计，处理高阶项缺乏边界条件的问题
AI.main_theorems: 在Navier-slip边界条件下，建立了三维可压缩Navier-Stokes方程在外部区域中具有密度依赖粘性系数和远场真空的局部正则解的存在唯一性，解在非齐次Sobolev空间中
AI.significance: 将Cauchy问题的结果推广到外部区域，处理了边界效应带来的新困难，为研究具有真空的可压缩流体在边界附近的行为提供了理论基础

title: Long- and short-time behavior of hypocoercive evolution equations with higher index via modal decompositions
summary: Hypocoercivity emerged in kinetic transport theory, allowing to derive exponential long-time estimates for evolution equations. Recently, the short-time asymptotics for equations with dissipative generators were obtained using the hypocoercivity index that is in finite dimensions surprisingly given by a Kalman-type rank condition well-known in control theory. However, the situation for unbounded generators is only understood for index one if modal decompositions are available. Here, we prove long- and short-time estimates for unbounded generators with higher index admitting a modal decomposition. Additionally, an explicit Lyapunov functional is constructed. The result is applied to a class of port-Hamiltonian systems with distributed dissipation.

AI.tldr: 建立了具有无界生成元和高次指标的演化方程的长时间和短时间估计，并构造了显式Lyapunov泛函
AI.motivation: 在动力学输运理论中，hypocoercivity方法用于推导演化方程的指数长时间估计。有限维情况下，hypocoercivity指标可由控制论中著名的Kalman型秩条件给出，但对于无界生成元，目前仅在指标为1且具有模态分解的情况下有理解。本文旨在处理具有更高指标的无界生成元情况。
AI.techniques: 采用hypocoercivity方法，利用模态分解技术处理无界生成元，构造显式Lyapunov泛函，应用Kalman型秩条件分析高次指标问题
AI.main_theorems: 证明了具有模态分解的无界生成元（包括高次指标情况）的长时间和短时间估计，构造了显式Lyapunov泛函，并将结果应用于一类具有分布耗散的端口哈密顿系统
AI.significance: 将hypocoercivity理论推广到无界生成元和高次指标情形，为分析更广泛的演化方程提供了理论框架，在控制论和偏微分方程理论间建立了新的联系，对端口哈密顿系统的稳定性分析有重要应用价值

title: Kružkov-type uniqueness theorem for a non-monotone flow function case with application to Riemann problem solutions
summary:
We generalize the previously obtained Kružkov-type uniqueness result for the initial-boundary value problem for the chemical flood conservation law system to the case of an almost arbitrary flow function, not restricted by the S-shaped condition or the monotonicity with respect to the chemical agent concentration. The result is applied to the analysis of the Riemann problem solutions for an S-shaped flow function changing monotonicity with respect to the chemical concentration exactly once. All possible Riemann problem solution structures are classified, including certain unique structures that have not been described in earlier studies.
  Keywords: Initial-boundary value problem; Riemann problem; first-order hyperbolic system; conservation laws; shock waves; uniqueness theorem; vanishing viscosity; chemical flood.

AI.tldr: 将Kružkov型唯一性结果推广到几乎任意流函数情形，并应用于S形流函数的黎曼问题结构分类
AI.motivation: 化学驱替守恒律系统的初始边值问题中，先前Kružkov型唯一性结果要求流函数满足S形条件或关于化学剂浓度的单调性，这限制了应用范围。本文旨在推广该唯一性结果，使其适用于几乎任意流函数，从而能够分析更一般的化学驱替模型。
AI.techniques: Kružkov型唯一性证明方法、守恒律理论、黎曼问题分析、激波理论、消失粘性法、流函数单调性变化分析
AI.main_theorems: 1. 将Kružkov型唯一性定理推广到几乎任意流函数的化学驱替守恒律系统初始边值问题；2. 对S形流函数且关于化学浓度单调性恰好变化一次的黎曼问题，给出了所有可能解结构的完整分类，包括先前研究中未描述的唯一结构
AI.significance: 理论上扩展了化学驱替模型唯一性结果的应用范围，为更一般的流函数提供了数学基础；对S形流函数黎曼问题的完整分类为数值模拟和实际应用提供了理论指导，特别是在石油开采的化学驱替过程中具有重要意义

title: On the singular elliptic problem involving the variable order fractional Musielak $g_{x,y}$-Laplacian
summary:
In this paper, we investigate the existence of positive weak solutions to a nonlocal singular elliptic problem under Dirichlet boundary condition. Problem is settled in fractional Musielak-Sobolev spaces with variable order. The main tool is variational approach, however, various auxiliary tools from the theory of nonlinear functional analysis, convex analysis
  and critical point theory are also applied.

AI.tldr: 研究非局部奇异椭圆问题在变阶分数Musielak-Sobolev空间中正弱解的存在性
AI.motivation: 研究Dirichlet边界条件下非局部奇异椭圆问题的正弱解存在性，该问题设置在变阶分数Musielak-Sobolev空间中，这类空间比传统分数Sobolev空间更一般化，能处理更复杂的非局部和变指数问题。
AI.techniques: 主要采用变分方法，结合非线性泛函分析、凸分析和临界点理论等辅助工具，在变阶分数Musielak-Sobolev空间的框架下处理非局部奇异问题。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了非局部奇异椭圆问题在变阶分数Musielak-Sobolev空间中正弱解的存在性结果，这是对传统分数Sobolev空间结果的推广。
AI.significance: 将非局部椭圆问题的研究推广到更一般的变阶分数Musielak-Sobolev空间框架，为处理更复杂的非局部奇异问题提供了新的理论工具，对分数阶偏微分方程理论有重要推进。

title: Bifurcation from the Kurth solution in galactic dynamics
summary: It will be shown that there exists an infinite-dimensional continuum ${\cal C}$ of weak static solutions of the Vlasov-Poisson system that bifurcates from the Kurth solution. Each $f_\ast\in {\cal C}$ has the charge density $ρ_{f_\ast}=ρ_{\rm Kurth}$, and (like the Kurth solution itself) each $f_\ast$ is surrounded by time-periodic weak solutions.

AI.tldr: 证明了Vlasov-Poisson系统存在一个从Kurth解分岔出的无限维连续统弱静态解族
AI.motivation: 研究Vlasov-Poisson系统的静态解结构，特别是从已知的Kurth解出发，探索其分岔行为和解的多重性
AI.techniques: 分岔理论、弱解方法、谱分析、时间周期解构造
AI.main_theorems: 存在从Kurth解分岔出的无限维连续统弱静态解族，每个解具有与Kurth解相同的电荷密度，且每个解周围存在时间周期弱解
AI.significance: 揭示了Vlasov-Poisson系统静态解的丰富结构，为等离子体物理和天体物理中的平衡态研究提供了新的数学基础

title: Selection mechanisms in front invasion
summary: We review progress on questions related to front propagation into unstable states and point out open problems in the area. We strive to highlight different theoretical perspectives and challenges while also addressing more practical questions with examples and guides to computational methods. Throughout we take a dynamical systems point of view that focuses on the ability of invasion processes to act as a selection mechanism in complex systems.

AI.tldr: 综述了不稳定态中波前传播问题的研究进展，强调其作为复杂系统中选择机制的作用
AI.motivation: 研究波前传播进入不稳定状态的问题，这是一个在非线性动力学、模式形成和复杂系统中具有基础重要性的课题。核心动机是理解入侵过程如何作为复杂系统中的选择机制，以及相关的理论挑战和计算方法。
AI.techniques: 采用动力系统观点，结合理论分析、计算方法和实例研究。强调不同理论视角的整合，包括偏微分方程分析、稳定性理论、渐近分析和数值模拟技术。
AI.main_theorems: 这是一篇综述性论文，没有提出新的定理，而是总结了该领域的关键进展：包括波前传播速度的选择机制、稳定性分析、模式选择问题、以及在不同物理和生物系统中的具体应用。
AI.significance: 该综述为理解复杂系统中的模式选择和动力学提供了统一的理论框架，对非线性科学、生物数学、材料科学和流体力学等领域有重要影响，同时指出了该领域的开放问题和未来研究方向。

title: Large deviations principle for the cubic NLS equation with slowly decaying data
summary: In this note, we prove a sharp large derivation principle (LDP) for the cubic nonlinear Schrödinger equation with Gaussian random initial data in Fourier Lebesgue spaces. As a consequence, we improve the exponential decay condition in [M.A. Garrido, R. Grande, K.M. Kurianski, G. Staffilani. Commun. Pure Appl. Math. 76 (2023), 4087--4136] to $\ell^1$ decay.

AI.tldr: 证明了具有高斯随机初始数据的立方非线性薛定谔方程在傅里叶勒贝格空间中的尖锐大偏差原理
AI.motivation: 研究立方非线性薛定谔方程在随机初始数据下的大偏差行为，特别是改进先前文献中的指数衰减条件
AI.techniques: 大偏差原理（LDP）、傅里叶勒贝格空间分析、高斯随机过程、概率方法在PDE中的应用
AI.main_theorems: 证明了立方NLS在傅里叶勒贝格空间中具有高斯随机初始数据的尖锐大偏差原理，将指数衰减条件改进为ℓ¹衰减
AI.significance: 改进了Garrido等人的结果，为随机PDE的大偏差理论提供了更优的衰减条件，对理解随机非线性波动方程的统计性质有重要意义
